treatment_information.treatment_response: Patient was alert and interactive post-operation

treatment_timeline.event: Patient presented with back pain and numbness in feet
Patient underwent outpatient MRI, which indicated possible cauda equina syndrome
Patient discharged with instructions for recovery

patient_outcome.follow_up_details: Follow up appointment recommended in 2 weeks post-operation
patient_outcome.long_term_prognosis: Expected to check incision and baseline X-rays at follow-up visit
